THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORCROSS, ART THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 7 CASTENADA AVENUE (LOWER UNIT), S.F. $4,786.47 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,786.47, LEASE FORFEITED
